conflict: A second murder appears at the river ramp with Isaiah's body again, even though the body was logged in county storage.
consequence: Inside access is confirmed as a live hypothesis, and Clay forms a closed task force that narrows Lena's autonomy.
must_land_beats: Second victim Lyle Fenn is identified.
Morgue log inconsistencies are documented, not merely suspected.
Mara Quinn is cut off from official briefings.
objective: Test whether the first scene was a singular stunt by securing morgue custody and tracking leaks.
